plan.action: Verify lib/workspace.sh defines WORKSPACE_DIRS=(Agents Input Output Output/ADR), WORKSPACE_REQUIRED_INPUTS=(Input/prd.json CLAUDE.md), and WORKSPACE_OUTPUT_FILES=(Output/progress.md Output/tech.md).
Verify bootstrap_workspace() uses mkdir -p for all WORKSPACE_DIRS and touch for WORKSPACE_OUTPUT_FILES only when absent.
Verify validate_workspace() iterates WORKSPACE_DIRS and WORKSPACE_REQUIRED_INPUTS, prints ERROR to stderr for each missing item, and returns 1 if any errors were found.
Verify workspace_init() calls bootstrap_workspace then validate_workspace, providing a single entry-point that bootstraps then fails fast on missing required inputs.

Confirm tests/workspace.bats covers: directory creation, placeholder file creation, no-overwrite for existing outputs, valid workspace passes, each required directory missing fails, each required input missing fails, workspace_init happy and sad paths.
Run shellcheck lib/workspace.sh — must exit 0 with no diagnostics.
Run bats tests/workspace.bats — all 9 tests must pass.

testing_recommendations: bootstrap_workspace creates Agents, Input, Output, Output/ADR directories
bootstrap_workspace creates Output/progress.md and Output/tech.md when absent
bootstrap_workspace does not overwrite existing output files
validate_workspace returns 0 when all required dirs and Input/prd.json + CLAUDE.md exist
validate_workspace returns 1 and prints ERROR when any required directory is missing
validate_workspace returns 1 and prints ERROR containing 'prd.json' when Input/prd.json is absent
validate_workspace returns 1 and prints ERROR containing 'CLAUDE.md' when CLAUDE.md is absent
workspace_init succeeds end-to-end when required inputs are pre-seeded
workspace_init fails with ERROR when required inputs are absent after bootstrap
